---
title: "visualizing weighted burden in feature"
author: "subhash"
date: "2026-04-01"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("."))
getwd()
```



```{r}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# ── PATHS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#LOAD_FILE <- "/mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/1.SAP_SNPs/3.plantcad/8.feature_load_callable/output/final/sample_feature_burden.tsv"
#RACE_FILE <- "/mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/1.SAP_SNPs/3.plantcad/7.feature_load_perMb/sorted_cluster_data.txt"
#OUT_PDF   <- "/mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/1.SAP_SNPs/3.plantcad/8.feature_load_callable/output/final/burden_per_callable_site_crossfeature.pdf"

LOAD_FILE <- "data/3.5_genomic_features/2._SAP_features/sample_feature_burden.tsv"
RACE_FILE <- "data/3.5_genomic_features/2._SAP_features/sorted_cluster_data.txt"
OUT_PDF   <- "graphs/01_publication/3.genetic_load/3.5_genomic_features/2.weighted_burden/burden_per_callable_site_crossfeature.pdf"


# ── MAPPINGS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cluster_to_race <- c(
  "1" = "Durra", "2" = "Kafir", "3" = "Caudatum",
  "4" = "Milo/Durra-Bicolor", "5" = "Mixed/Bicolor", "6" = "Guinea"
)

race_pal <- c(
  "Durra"              = "#FF7F00",
  "Kafir"              = "#E69F00",
  "Caudatum"           = "#984EA3",
  "Milo/Durra-Bicolor" = "#F781BF",
  "Mixed/Bicolor"      = "#A6A6A6",
  "Guinea"             = "#56B4E9"
)

RACE_ORDER  <- c("Durra","Kafir","Caudatum","Milo/Durra-Bicolor","Mixed/Bicolor","Guinea")
FEAT_ORDER  <- c("exon","intron","upstream_2kb","downstream_2kb","intergenic")
FEAT_LABELS <- c("Exon","Intron","Upstream 2 kb","Downstream 2 kb","Intergenic")

# ── LOAD & PREP ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
load_dt <- fread(LOAD_FILE)
race_dt <- fread(RACE_FILE)

race_dt[, sample := paste0(PI_numbers, "_", PI_numbers)]
race_dt[, race   := cluster_to_race[as.character(Cluster)]]

dt <- merge(load_dt, race_dt[, .(sample, race)], by = "sample", all.x = TRUE)
dt <- dt[!is.na(race)]
dt <- dt[!is.na(burden_per_callable_site)]

dt[, feature := factor(feature, levels = FEAT_ORDER, labels = FEAT_LABELS)]
dt[, race    := factor(race,    levels = RACE_ORDER)]

# ── SUMMARY CHECK ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\nburden_per_callable_site summary by feature:\n")
print(dt[, .(
  mean   = round(mean(burden_per_callable_site, na.rm = TRUE), 6),
  median = round(median(burden_per_callable_site, na.rm = TRUE), 6),
  sd     = round(sd(burden_per_callable_site, na.rm = TRUE), 6)
), by = feature][order(feature)])

# ── PER-FEATURE RACE ORDER (high → low mean burden) ──────────────────────────
race_order_per_feat <- dt[, .(
  mean_burden = mean(burden_per_callable_site, na.rm = TRUE)
), by = .(feature, race)][order(feature, -mean_burden)]

# ── SHARED Y RANGE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
y_min <- floor(min(dt$burden_per_callable_site, na.rm = TRUE) * 1000) / 1000
y_max <- ceiling(max(dt$burden_per_callable_site, na.rm = TRUE) * 1000) / 1000

race_x_labels <- c(
  "Durra"              = "Durra",
  "Kafir"              = "Kafir",
  "Caudatum"           = "Caudatum",
  "Milo/Durra-Bicolor" = "Milo/\nDurra-Bicolor",
  "Mixed/Bicolor"      = "Mixed/\nBicolor",
  "Guinea"             = "Guinea"
)

# ── BASE THEME ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
base_theme <- theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    plot.title         = element_blank(),
    plot.subtitle      = element_blank(),
    strip.text         = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", color = "grey15"),
    strip.background   = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x        = element_text(angle = 38, hjust = 1, size = 8, color = "grey20"),
    axis.text.y        = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey20"),
    axis.title.x       = element_blank(),
    axis.line          = element_line(color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.35),
    axis.ticks         = element_line(color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey93", linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    legend.position    = "none",
    plot.background    = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    panel.background   = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.margin        = margin(4, 2, 4, 2)
  )

# ── PANEL BUILDER ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
make_panel <- function(feat_label, show_y = FALSE, show_legend = FALSE) {

  sub <- dt[feature == feat_label]

  feat_race_order <- race_order_per_feat[feature == feat_label, as.character(race)]
  sub[, race_ordered := factor(race, levels = feat_race_order)]

  n_callable_median <- round(median(sub$callable_selected_sites, na.rm = TRUE))

  p <- ggplot(sub, aes(x = race_ordered, y = burden_per_callable_site, fill = race)) +
    geom_violin(
      trim      = TRUE,
      scale     = "width",
      alpha     = 0.85,
      linewidth = 0,
      color     = NA
    ) +
    geom_boxplot(
      width         = 0.18,
      outlier.shape = NA,
      fill          = "white",
      color         = "grey20",
      linewidth     = 0.4,
      alpha         = 0.9
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = race_pal, name = "Race", labels = race_x_labels) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = race_x_labels) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(y_min, y_max)) +
    labs(
      title    = feat_label,
      subtitle = paste0("median callable sites = ", formatC(n_callable_median, format = "d", big.mark = ","))
    ) +
    base_theme +
    theme(
      plot.title    = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 2)),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 7.5, color = "grey50", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 4))
    )

  if (!show_y) {
    p <- p + theme(
      axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      axis.line.y  = element_blank()
    )
  } else {
    p <- p + labs(y = "weighted burden per callable site") +
      theme(axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9, margin = margin(r = 6)))
  }

  if (show_legend) {
    p <- p + theme(
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.title    = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
      legend.text     = element_text(size = 8.5),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.5, "cm")
    ) +
      guides(fill = guide_legend(
        override.aes = list(alpha = 1, color = NA, shape = 22, size = 4)
      ))
  }

  p
}

# ── BUILD PANELS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
p1 <- make_panel("Exon",            show_y = TRUE,  show_legend = FALSE)
p2 <- make_panel("Intron",          show_y = FALSE, show_legend = FALSE)
p3 <- make_panel("Upstream 2 kb",   show_y = FALSE, show_legend = FALSE)
p4 <- make_panel("Downstream 2 kb", show_y = FALSE, show_legend = FALSE)
p5 <- make_panel("Intergenic",      show_y = FALSE, show_legend = TRUE)

# ── ASSEMBLE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fig <- (p1 | p2 | p3 | p4 | p5) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1.2, 1, 1, 1, 1.35)) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Weighted deleterious burden per callable site by genomic feature and sorghum race"
  ) &
  theme(
    plot.title      = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.margin     = margin(14, 14, 10, 14)
  )

# ── SAVE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cairo_pdf(OUT_PDF, width = 16, height = 5.5, family = "Arial")
print(fig)
dev.off()

cat("Saved:", OUT_PDF, "\n")

```






```{r}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# ── PATHS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
LOAD_FILE <- "/mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/1.SAP_SNPs/3.plantcad/8.feature_load_callable/output/final/sample_feature_burden.tsv"
RACE_FILE <- "/mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/1.SAP_SNPs/3.plantcad/7.feature_load_perMb/sorted_cluster_data.txt"
OUT_PDF   <- "/mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/1.SAP_SNPs/3.plantcad/8.feature_load_callable/output/final/burden_per_callable_site_byrace.pdf"

# ── MAPPINGS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cluster_to_race <- c(
  "1" = "Durra", "2" = "Kafir", "3" = "Caudatum",
  "4" = "Milo/Durra-Bicolor", "5" = "Mixed/Bicolor", "6" = "Guinea"
)

race_pal <- c(
  "Durra"              = "#FF7F00",
  "Kafir"              = "#E69F00",
  "Caudatum"           = "#984EA3",
  "Milo/Durra-Bicolor" = "#F781BF",
  "Mixed/Bicolor"      = "#A6A6A6",
  "Guinea"             = "#56B4E9"
)

RACE_ORDER  <- c("Durra","Kafir","Caudatum","Milo/Durra-Bicolor","Mixed/Bicolor","Guinea")
FEAT_ORDER  <- c("exon","intron","upstream_2kb","downstream_2kb","intergenic")
FEAT_LABELS <- c("Exon","Intron","Upstream\n2 kb","Downstream\n2 kb","Intergenic")

feat_pal <- c(
  "Exon"            = "#7B3F9E",
  "Intron"          = "#E07B3A",
  "Upstream\n2 kb"  = "#3A82C4",
  "Downstream\n2 kb"= "#3AA87A",
  "Intergenic"      = "#888888"
)

# ── LOAD & PREP ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
load_dt <- fread(LOAD_FILE)
race_dt <- fread(RACE_FILE)

race_dt[, sample := paste0(PI_numbers, "_", PI_numbers)]
race_dt[, race   := cluster_to_race[as.character(Cluster)]]

dt <- merge(load_dt, race_dt[, .(sample, race)], by = "sample", all.x = TRUE)
dt <- dt[!is.na(race)]
dt <- dt[!is.na(burden_per_callable_site)]

dt[, feature := factor(feature, levels = FEAT_ORDER, labels = FEAT_LABELS)]
dt[, race    := factor(race, levels = RACE_ORDER)]

# ── SHARED Y RANGE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
y_min <- floor(min(dt$burden_per_callable_site, na.rm = TRUE) * 1000) / 1000
y_max <- ceiling(max(dt$burden_per_callable_site, na.rm = TRUE) * 1000) / 1000

# ── FEATURE ORDER per race (high → low mean) ─────────────────────────────────
feat_order_per_race <- dt[, .(
  mean_burden = mean(burden_per_callable_site, na.rm = TRUE)
), by = .(race, feature)][order(race, -mean_burden)]

# ── PANEL BUILDER ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
make_race_panel <- function(race_label, show_y = FALSE) {

  sub <- dt[race == race_label]
  n   <- sub[, uniqueN(sample)]

  race_feat_order <- feat_order_per_race[race == race_label, as.character(feature)]
  sub[, feat_ordered := factor(feature, levels = race_feat_order)]

  p <- ggplot(sub, aes(x = feat_ordered, y = burden_per_callable_site, fill = feature)) +
    geom_violin(
      trim      = TRUE,
      scale     = "width",
      alpha     = 0.85,
      linewidth = 0,
      color     = NA
    ) +
    geom_boxplot(
      width         = 0.22,
      outlier.shape = NA,
      fill          = "white",
      color         = "grey20",
      linewidth     = 0.4,
      alpha         = 0.9
    ) +
    stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 18, size = 2.2, color = "grey15") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = feat_pal, guide = "none") +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(y_min, y_max)) +
    labs(
      title    = race_label,
      subtitle = paste0("n = ", n)
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 9.5) +
    theme(
      plot.title         = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5,
                                        color = race_pal[race_label], margin = margin(b = 2)),
      plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 7.5, color = "grey50",
                                        hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 3)),
      axis.text.x        = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1, size = 7.5, color = "grey20"),
      axis.text.y        = element_text(size = 7.5, color = "grey20"),
      axis.title.x       = element_blank(),
      axis.line          = element_line(color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.35),
      axis.ticks         = element_line(color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.3),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey93", linewidth = 0.3),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      legend.position    = "none",
      plot.background    = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.background   = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.margin        = margin(4, 4, 4, 4)
    )

  if (!show_y) {
    p <- p + theme(
      axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      axis.line.y  = element_blank()
    )
  } else {
    p <- p + labs(y = "Weighted burden per callable selected site") +
      theme(axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9, margin = margin(r = 6)))
  }

  p
}

# ── BUILD 6 RACE PANELS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
p1 <- make_race_panel("Durra",              show_y = TRUE)
p2 <- make_race_panel("Kafir",              show_y = FALSE)
p3 <- make_race_panel("Caudatum",           show_y = FALSE)
p4 <- make_race_panel("Milo/Durra-Bicolor", show_y = FALSE)
p5 <- make_race_panel("Mixed/Bicolor",      show_y = FALSE)
p6 <- make_race_panel("Guinea",             show_y = FALSE)

# ── FEATURE LEGEND ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
legend_data <- data.table(
  feature = factor(FEAT_LABELS, levels = FEAT_LABELS),
  x = 1, y = 1
)

legend_plot <- ggplot(legend_data, aes(x = x, y = y, fill = feature)) +
  geom_point(shape = 22, size = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = feat_pal, name = "Feature") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title    = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    legend.text     = element_text(size = 8.5),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 4, alpha = 1)))

# ── ASSEMBLE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fig <- (p1 | p2 | p3 | p4 | p5 | p6 | legend_plot) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1.2, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 0.5)) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Weighted deleterious burden per callable site by sorghum race"
  ) &
  theme(
    plot.title      = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.margin     = margin(14, 14, 10, 14)
  )

# ── SAVE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cairo_pdf(OUT_PDF, width = 18, height = 5.5, family = "Arial")
print(fig)
dev.off()

cat("Saved:", OUT_PDF, "\n")
```
